purpose: Reusable Remotion background references from user-provided examples

presets.description: Minimal deep-blue space gradient with thin vertical center line, tiny distant subject, subtle star/line texture, orange horizon glow near bottom.
presets.textGuidance: Use white or warm cream headlines; orange for key number; sparse uppercase labels.

presets.description: Clean vertical sky gradient: dark blue top, cyan middle, warm orange bottom. No heavy texture.
presets.textGuidance: Use strong dark or white text depending on local contrast; avoid low-saturation purple on cyan.

presets.description: Bright warm pastel wash with yellow/orange center and soft cyan edge, suitable for optimistic CTA or conclusion.
presets.textGuidance: Use navy/charcoal headlines, orange highlights, and avoid white body text.
